column.text:
• Atlanta Braves transferred RHP Spencer Strider to the 60-day injured list with right elbow inflammation.
• Kansas City Royals placed LHP Cole Ragans on the 60-day injured list with a left elbow impingement.
• Cleveland Guardians placed RF Chase DeLauter on the 10-day injured list with a right side rib fracture.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Los Angeles Angels designated 1B Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Atlanta Braves designated RHP Hunter Stratton for assignment.
• Boston Red Sox sent LHP Patrick Sandoval on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Portland Sea Dogs.
• Detroit Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.
• Los Angeles Angels activated 2B Vaughn Grissom from the 10-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
